states.name: Anya
states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description: It was only a matter of time before the hundredth Vessel was going to be discovered, and Luther von Draclow—the head of the Red Dragon Organization—was growing anxious. Anticipating the worst, he approved a new set of equipment for Anya—knowing full well that it might put her in danger.

states.name: Anya
states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description: Anya's new equipment included a Quantum Amplification Unit—a device capable of forcibly awakening the girl's latent abilities by pushing her computational capabilities to their very limits. However, the rapid amplification drastically increased the load on her brain, raising fears that it could endanger her life.

states.name: Anya
states.title: Divine Mecha Girl
states.description:
Thanks to the new equipment and a certain devilish plan, Anya's true power was unleashed—but at the same time, the extreme strain on her brain caused her to fall into a coma.
Looking at his daughter as she lay in a hospital bed, Luther was consumed by deep remorse.
